[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111100000 4
1 010111001 5
2 101110100 5
3 001100110 4
4 010101010 4
5 111100000 4
6 010111111 7
7 000101000 2

01 10 101011110 6
12 21 101011100 5
23 32 010101010 4 match 4
34 43 111101010 6
45 54 111111111 a
56 65 010111111 7 match 6
67 76 001101110 5
70 07 001100110 4 match 3

02 20 000000110 2
13 31 111111110 8
24 42 111100000 4 match 0 5
35 53 010111111 7 match 6
46 64 111101000 5
57 75 011111111 8
60 06 000101110 4
71 17 101111110 7

25 52 010111111 7 match 6

47 74 111100110 6
50 05 010111111 7 match 6
61 16 101111100 6
72 27 001100110 4 match 3

26 62 000101000 2 match 7
37 73 011101110 6
